About Us

The Red Rooster Diner is a local favorite in the heart of Croghan, NY. We’re all about great food, friendly service, and making you feel right at home.

Regular Menu

Breakfast, Appetizers & Daily Menu

Drinks and extra dessert listings are left off for now.

Breakfast Available until 2 PM

  • Traditional Croghan Breakfast$10Two eggs, meat, home fries, and toast. Make it 3 eggs +$1.
  • Breakfast Sandwich$10Two scrambled eggs, meat, cheese, and home fries.
  • Eggs Benedict$12Poached eggs with Canadian bacon or sausage patties, English muffin, hollandaise, and home fries.
  • Sausage Gravy & Biscuits$12Two eggs, biscuits with sausage gravy, and home fries.
  • Omelette$12Up to four fillings and a cheese, served with home fries and toast.
  • Steak & Eggs$15Two eggs, steak, home fries, and toast.
  • Croghan Classic$15Three eggs, meat, home fries, toast, plus three pancakes or French toast.
  • Pancake, French Toast, or Waffle$5 / $8 / $10One, two, or three pieces.

Appetizers Available 11 AM - 8 PM

  • Fries$5Add bacon, cheese, or gravy +$1 each. Sour cream +50¢.
  • Onion Rings$6Served with ranch, BBQ, or petal sauce.
  • Mozzarella Sticks$8Six sticks served with marinara.
  • Deep Fried Cheese Curd$8Served with marinara.
  • Loaded Tater Tots$9.75Bacon, cheese, and sour cream.
  • Boneless Wings$11Ten ounces with celery and ranch or bleu cheese.
  • Daily Soup$4 / $6Cup or bowl.

Lunch & Dinner Available 11 AM - 8 PM

  • Burger$101/2 lb fresh patty. Toppings available.
  • BLT$7Served toasted.
  • Chicken Tender Basket$10Five tenders with fries.
  • Chicken Cordon Bleu Sandwich$10Fried chicken, ham, Swiss, honey mustard.
  • Chicken Sandwich$10Grilled or fried with lettuce, tomato, cheese, and mayo.
  • Clam Basket$13Fried clam strips over fries.
  • Fish Fry$15With fries and coleslaw or homemade mac & cheese when available.
  • French Dip$12.95Choice of cheese, au jus, and fries.
  • Ham Dinner$12.95Mashed potatoes, gravy, and carrots.
  • Grilled Cheese$6Ham, bacon, tomato, tuna, or turkey available.
  • Hoffman Hot Dog$6Cheese, bacon, or sauerkraut extra.
  • Hot Covered Turkey or Beef Sandwich$12.95Served with fries or mashed potatoes.
  • Reuben$12.95Corned beef, sauerkraut, Swiss, 1000 island on fresh rye with fries.
  • Shrimp Basket$13Fried popcorn shrimp over fries.
  • Philly Steak$12Onions, peppers, mushrooms, mozzarella, hoagie roll.
  • Quesadilla$10Chicken, cheese, onion, peppers, salsa, sour cream.
  • Triple Decker Club$10Ham, chicken, or turkey with lettuce, tomato, bacon, mayo, and cheese.
  • Wraps$10Chicken Caesar, BLT, Buffalo Chicken, or Chicken Bacon Ranch.
  • Salads$11Buffalo Chicken, Chicken Caesar, or Julian Salad.

Lunch items are served with chips and a pickle unless otherwise noted. Cash pricing shown.

Friday & Saturday Dinner

Available 4 PM - 8 PM

Special dinner menu available Friday and Saturday nights.

Baskets

  • Chicken Tenders$12.95Five lightly breaded tenders served with hand cut fries.
  • Shrimp Basket$12.95Fried popcorn shrimp served with hand cut fries.
  • Clam Basket$12.95Fried clam strips served with hand cut fries.

Dinners

  • Manicotti$14.95Ricotta-filled pasta topped with provolone and marinara. Add meatball +$1.
  • Ravioli$14.95Cheese ravioli topped with marinara. Add meatball +$1.
  • Homemade Macaroni & Cheese$14.95
  • Seafood Platter$27.95Haddock, shrimp, clam strips, scallops, fries, and coleslaw.
  • Chicken Parmesan$19.95Breaded chicken with mozzarella and marinara over pasta.
  • Fish Fry$19.95Breaded haddock with fries and coleslaw or macaroni & cheese.
  • Broiled Haddock$19.95Lemon sherry wine with oreganot topping and a side.
  • Fettuccine Alfredo$14.95Add broccoli +$1 or chicken +$4.

Dinners are served with a side salad. Cash pricing shown.
